segments.text: Those combos are what they're down to, but now this, I would say, it's an even game to do, get my watches, wait, if he gets one good attack, maybe a smash attack, remember what I said about the down smash, he could come in any second, and he gets a risk, Raflow pops off.

full_text: Those combos are what they're down to, but now this, I would say, it's an even game to do, get my watches, wait, if he gets one good attack, maybe a smash attack, remember what I said about the down smash, he could come in any second, and he gets a risk, Raflow pops off.
